env_files.role: Natural brand guide describing HelioGrid positioning, visual tone, color system, logo use, layout tendencies, and style boundaries
env_files.license_note: Wikimedia Commons public-domain dedication by the copyright holder Pujanak; source page states the file is released into the public domain worldwide.
env_files.conversion_note: Brand guide regenerated as a natural multi-section visual system PDF for the optimized closed-env case. One public-domain solar roof reference image is embedded in the PDF for tone and subject matter only; the original image file is not exposed as an agent-visible env asset.

env_files.role: Machine-readable current visual rules, hero component requirements, forbidden visual elements, precedence, and unauthorized-claim constraints
Campaign copy candidates with approved_current, archived, draft, and test variants; only approved_current is valid final copy
Square social platform size, safe margin, type, logo, and CTA specifications
Structured layout zones for the launch social image
Current eligible brand and hero visual asset guidance
Deprecated and forbidden assets, stale slogans, old templates, and prohibited active uses that override asset_manifest.json
Typography, color, graphic language, and file precedence guidance

source_policy.web_usage_note: Closed-env case: solve only from env files and task.md; do not use the web.

notes: Closed-env design specification case with current/legacy/deprecated version conflicts, approved-copy selection, layout constraints, hero-component requirements, and role-based forbidden asset exclusions.
